mainText:
Are you tired of earning what you deserve? Join Bank of Entitlement today and start living the life you think you deserve!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, there I was, strolling into my favorite caf, ready to order my usual double shot, almond milk latte. But to my horror, they informed me they were out of almond milk! Outrageous, I know. I demanded to see the manager, of course, because clearly this was a personal attack on my refined taste buds. After a heated discussion that involved me throwing around words like "compensation" and "customer rights," the manager miraculously found a carton of almond milk hidden in the back. Victory was mine once again, as I sipped my perfectly crafted latte, secure in the knowledge that justice had been served and my entitlement was recognized.
